items.title: 👋 Welcome
notes: <mark>Thanks for stopping by</mark>. This is a timeline of some of my work over the years, with a few highlights mixed in.
Scroll through to explore. The details update as you move through each moment, unfolding as you go.

items.title: ✨ Prompt + Vibe Coding
notes: I've taken a <mark>short break from full-time work</mark> to focus on how things actually get built now.
I'm working hands-on across design, prototypes, and code, applying what I've done for years in new ways to move faster, with less overhead and fewer dependencies.

items.title: 💉 GLP-1 Launch
items.description: Original approach through AI exploration to the final shipped experience.
notes: I stepped into the work when it wasn't really landing and pushed to reset the direction.
Built a new vision in under 48 hours, tying product and brand together in a way that finally clicked.
Ended up being the most successful launch to date, <mark>~1200% MoM subscription growth</mark>.

items.title: 💊 Subscription Launch
items.description: Hair Loss and ED treatment experiences, from early concepts to final subscription-based flows.
notes: Expanded GoodRx's offerings with its <mark>first recurring subscription product</mark>, starting with ED and later extending to Hair Loss, building the full experience end to end to support ongoing use and predictable revenue.

items.title: 🏠 Homepage Redesign
items.description: From early discovery to final merchandised homepage experience.
notes: Reworked the homepage into a <mark>merchandised, retail-style experience</mark> aligned with the product and business direction.
Created a clearer front door that better supports discovery and conversion.

items.title: 📱 App IA Redesign
notes: Redesigned the app structure to <mark>support product growth and complexity</mark>.
Simplified navigation and improved clarity across key flows.

items.title: 📍 Customer Journeys
items.description: The evolution of the customer journey.
notes: Defined end-to-end customer journeys across the product, working with research, illustration, and information design to bring them to life.
Rolled out across PDE teams and company leadership to align on a <mark>shared understanding of the experience</mark>.

items.title: 🎩 New Look and Feel
items.description: Rapid concepting, workshopping, and iteration to explore and refine the direction.
notes: Rolled out an <mark>updated visual system</mark> across core product surfaces, using concepting and workshops to push direction, secure company buy-in, and then test and iterate into a more cohesive, scalable system.

items.title: 🏥 Price Page Refresh
items.description: From early versions through ongoing A/B testing to the final experience.
notes: Rebuilt high-traffic pricing and coupon pages through continuous experimentation and iteration.
Evolved the experience over multiple versions, improving clarity, usability, and decision-making on one of the company's <mark>largest revenue drivers</mark>.

items.title: 👩🏻‍⚕️ Medicine Cabinet
items.description: Early blueprint wires used to set the vision and align the team.
notes: Partnered with the team to ideate and <mark>shape the early vision</mark> for the product.
Used blueprint wires and concept work to set direction and align on what Medicine Cabinet could become.

items.title: 💎 Design Excellence
notes: <mark>Raised the bar</mark> on craft and critique while filling key roles across content, ops, and leadership.
A stronger foundation for quality and durability at scale.

items.title: 💼 Joined GoodRx
notes: Joined as <mark>SVP of Product Design</mark> across product and content.
Focused on helping more Americans get the health care they need.

items.title: 🖌️ Brand Redesign
notes: Refreshed the brand to align with the new product look and feel direction.
<mark>Modernized the marketing surface</mark> so it finally lived up to the quality of the work we were shipping.

items.title: 🎨 Product Redesign
notes: Delivered a <mark>new look and feel</mark> across the product, taking it from a dense, cluttered surface to a calmer, clearer experience.
Used layout and color studies to unify a fragmented system and scale the design across every device.

items.title: 🗺️ Customer Journeys
notes: <mark>Mapped the end-to-end journey</mark> across every Outreach role, from Admin to CRO.
Gave product and go-to-market a shared frame to plan against.

items.title: 🇨🇿 International Expansion
notes: Expanded the design team internationally with the launch of the <mark>Prague office</mark>.
Built a more distributed, scalable team across time zones.

items.title: 💼 Joined Outreach
notes: Joined Outreach as VP of Design during a period of <mark>rapid product and org growth</mark>.
Stepped into design leadership across the platform.

items.title: 🍋 Lemonade
notes: My time at Navan was short, but I helped <mark>set the vision for consumer travel</mark> just as the pandemic was upending day-to-day business travel.
Shipped Navan's first consumer product in under 9 months, pushing the company beyond enterprise travel into a new category.

items.title: 💼 Joined Navan
notes: Joined Navan to lead design at the intersection of travel, product, and brand.
Started shaping how design would scale the company into its next chapter.

items.title: 🏗️ Slack IA
notes: Led the workstream, partnering <mark>directly with the CEO</mark> to rethink Slack's information architecture.
Restructured the interface to scale with the product's future across more surfaces, more tools, and more people.

items.title: 🗺️ Journey Mapping
notes: Rolled out journey mapping across the organization to build a shared understanding of the user experience.
Ran workshops <mark>across every function</mark>, including engineering, product, marketing, sales, and the C-suite.

items.title: 📥 Slack Inbox
notes: Skunkworks project with the CEO, a Principal Engineer, and a small handful of others.
Designed a new tool to triage Slack, a way to cut through noise and <mark>surface what actually mattered</mark>.

items.title: 🎉 Best Onboarding
notes: Rebuilt the first-run experience so new users and teams got started right.
Indexed on <mark>long-term customer love</mark> over quick-fix activation metrics.

items.title: 💼 Joined Slack
notes: Joined to lead Growth, helping more people and teams find their way into Slack.
Eventually stepped up to Head of Design, owning craft and direction across the product.

items.title: 🏰 Early Disney+
notes: Designed the overseas beta that became <mark>the foundation for Disney+</mark>.
Shaped the streaming experience across Apple TV and mobile before the global launch.

items.title: 💸 Wallet App
notes: Built an <mark>experimental</mark> kids' allowance and wallet product inside Disney Labs.
Explored how families could share money, set controls, and pay in-store with confidence.

items.title: 💼 Joined Disney
notes: Joined Disney to work on <mark>new platform concepts</mark> and early product directions.
Stepped from a smaller-company environment into a much broader entertainment ecosystem.

items.title: ✉️ AWeber
notes: Creative Director leading a team of 15+ across marketing, branding, UI, and UX.
<mark>Owned the full creative surface</mark> as the company scaled through its biggest growth phase.

items.title: 👌 Okayplayer
notes: Creative Director <mark>building brand expressions in Flash</mark>, crafting interactive experiences for artists like D'Angelo, Common, The Roots, Montell Jordan, and more.

items.title: 🍔 Burger Artist
notes: Worked at <mark>McDonald's</mark>, saving every paycheck for a Nintendo 64. Moved through a few department store jobs after that, but most of my time was spent at home teaching myself how to build websites and mastering my pirated copy of Photoshop. Around then I started picking up early freelance work as a digital graphic designer, figuring it out as I went.
